mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, client_id, redirect_uri, redirect_uri_hash, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_capability_oauth_redirect_uri WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND client_id = #{clientId} AND status = 'ENABLED' AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
